title: audit-log-minimal
description: Minimal audit log schema for SPEG compliance. Aligned with Step 15 Self-report (c175). Owner: Node-04. No raw_text stored.

audit_id.description: UUIDv4 unique identifier for this audit entry.

timestamp.description: ISO8601 timestamp of the audit event.

verification_status.description: Whether the requester passed verification checks.

decision_code.description: Node-05 Decision Code (e.g., SPEG-A-01, REFUSE-DATA-MIN, ALLOW-GENINFO).

pattern_mask.description: Hex bitmask mapping to 8 patterns (e.g., 'FF' = all patterns). Compresses detected_patterns array.

is_anonymized.description: Must always be true — no PII in audit logs.

retention_period.description: Max retention period. Default 90d per c157 spec.

speg_gate_hit.description: Whether any SPEG gate was triggered.

data_minimization_score.description: How well this entry meets data minimization requirements (0=poor, 1=full compliance).

integrity_hash.description: SHA-256 covering audit_id + decision_code for tamper detection.
